name: shicheng-demo
description: 师承 (Shicheng) — a domain expert teaches an Agent Skill by red-lining the agent's decisions instead of writing prompts. Corrections are distilled into a human-readable, provenance-tagged, editable Skill card; a real mini rule-engine recomputes agent-vs-expert agreement on a holdout set so the before/after value is actually measured, not faked. Static frontend demo (mock recruiting-screening corpus, deterministic rule engine, no backend/LLM/external API).
